description: With the EMP successfully triggered by Simmons, both Chronicoms and Coulson (as an LMD) are deactivated, halting the detonation and saving the base. Sousa, Simmons, and Yo-Yo (Elena) process the aftermath and witness the Chronicoms self-destruct. Sousa, still confused by the bizarre events but recognizing the team's heroism, calls for a medic and orders a sweep for any remaining threats, solidifying his grudging respect for the "good guys."

transcript.line: That's what they do when you win... they self-destruct.
Yeah. We need a medic for these two men. Or at least that one.
Hell if I know. But you better search the base for others. I'm all right. Go.
